commands.name: simple-password
commands.title: Generate Simple Password
commands.description: Generate a simple, easy-to-remember password from dinopass.com

commands.name: strong-password
commands.title: Generate Strong Password
commands.description: Generate a strong password from dinopass.com

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
